question: Describe the specific cooking actions and on-screen instructions shown during the onion preparation phase.
canonical_answer: At 14s, chopped white onions are added to a stainless steel pan containing oil; at 15s, text instructs to heat vegetable oil over medium-low; at 17s, a tattooed hand stirs the onions using a white spatula; at 19s, overlay text directs to cook for 10 minutes and cool completely before proceeding.

question: Narrate the visual progression from the initial kitchen setup to the active sautéing process.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a male chef stands in a professional kitchen wearing a striped apron; at 6s, various ingredients sit in containers on a granite countertop; at 14s, blue flames appear under a frying pan as onions are added; at 18s, the hand stirs the mixture while text instructions appear on screen.
